headline: Order food with AI — a personal agent that actually does the clicking

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to order meals, groceries, and delivery without babysitting apps
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Order food with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
queries: computer use AI agent ordering food
site_brief.title: Order food with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can coordinate food ordering across delivery apps, preferences, addresses, payment confirmation, and repeat orders

summary: This use‑case shows how Super acts as a personal AI agent that can operate real food and grocery apps, confirm details, and reuse a computer-use cache so repeat orders get faster and cheaper over time. It’s written for people who want meals handled end‑to‑end without babysitting delivery apps.
